hero.title: SEBASTIÁN DÍAZ
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Engineer
hero.description: Software developer with 5+ years of experience, passionate about innovation and continuous learning. I excel in architecting new solutions and optimizing existing platforms, specializing in transforming complex business requirements into elegant, efficient systems.

about.name: Sebastián Díaz
about.description1: Full Stack Developer specialized in transforming complex business visions into <1>scalable, high-impact digital realities</1>.
about.description2: With a proven track record architecting platforms like <1>Reactable AI</1> and <1>Junngla SpA</1>, I bridge the gap between <3>enterprise-grade engineering</3>—spanning Node.js, Nest.js, and Cloud Infrastructure—and premium product design.
about.description3: A Certified Scrum Professional dedicated to <1>agile precision</1> and <3>evolutionary code quality</3>. I don't just build software; I engineer adaptive systems designed to scale with your business and captivate your users.

jobs.description: Led development and maintenance of backend infrastructure for an AI-driven platform, implementing robust API architecture and cloud-based solutions.
achievements: Architected high-performance backend with Nest.js, reducing API response time by 40%
Designed database models with PostgreSQL & Prisma, improving query performance by 45%
Orchestrated microservices deployment on GCP with Kubernetes
Implemented Paddle payment processing, increasing subscription conversion by 30%
Developed LinkedIn & Instagram auth integrations, boosting engagement by 35%

jobs.description: Led pivotal projects in QR-based payment transactions, developed global APIs for resource management, and created feature-rich user dashboards.
achievements: Drove development of dynamic Vue.js web applications with responsive UI
Introduced QR Scanner to enhance user interaction and streamline access
Created a global configuration API, reducing setup time by 35%
Developed user dashboard improving security with role-based access

jobs.description: Contributed to a business-focused stories application, utilizing a diverse tech stack and contributing to meaningful growth metrics.
achievements: Implemented Producer/Consumer micro-services with Apache Kafka, reducing data transfer latency by 30%
Designed React.js frontend with TypeScript, JSX, and Material UI
Expanded application reach via Electron.js desktop app, increasing adoption by 20%
Developed Samsung Tizen Smart TV applications, growing user base by 15%

jobs.description: Interned working on a software system for managing public hospitals in Chile, optimizing server performance and database operations.
achievements: Optimized server performance with PHP, accelerating responses by 30% via SQL stored procedures
Efficient PostgreSQL data retrieval and operations
Built interactive frontend features with JavaScript, Ajax, and jQuery
